body.title: Re-verify and update capability_map.md — stale 8+ days
body.result: §1/§2/§3/§4 re-verified; P1 fixed, distillation fixed, all prior in_progress items closed, sprint-ready list updated
body.description:
Day-close audit (2026-05-05) flagged capability_map.md as 8 days stale. Need to re-verify §1 (live subsystems), §2 (gated off), and §4 (known broken) against current state: palace subsystem_index, igor.switches.cfg, cc_queue status, latest pytest summary. Update Last-updated date.

**Affected files:** ~/TheIgors/lab/docs/capability_map.md
**Design rules:** none
**Scope boundary:** Verify and update the three sections only; no code changes.
**Test plan:** No tests — doc-only. Verify by reading updated doc against live state.
